description: CompositionWhite and green checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a stand collar with a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm buttoned tabs, yoked back, seams lined on front for Fit, pocket on left chest and branding on right chest and a curved hemFitSlimWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its tiny checks will give you a dashing air. The mid arm tabs on the sleeves mean you can roll them up when the weather gets warmer, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sneakers for that perfect casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
